excerpt: The whole world agrees that there are two things in the universe as fundamental: that existence takes precedence over non-existence. Then there are two types of existence...all reaching that knowledge...is the real thing that has precedence over the entire universe.
source_location_hint: Opening cosmological exposition in Ismaili epistemology

excerpt: Knowledge is in the essence of the intellect, just as a pearl is in the essence of an oyster. Everything except the Creator is surrounded by knowledge. The first intellect first acquired this knowledge and then through it all the other intellects received that knowledge.
source_location_hint: Doctrine of the First Intellect and knowledge emanation

excerpt: In the spiritual world, the Creator bestowed upon the Ishbah the essence of knowledge, power and life. When these revelations were received, they became their essence and they were called intellects. Intellect is the essence of knowledge, power and life!
source_location_hint: Doctrine of spiritual emanation and intellective actualisation

excerpt: The first thing that Allaah has created is the intellect. Then he commanded the intellect: 'Go ahead!' So she stepped forward, then he said, 'Turn back!' Allah said, 'O intellect! I will punish you and reward you because of you!'
source_location_hint: Hadith on creation of intellect and divine command

excerpt: It is the best thing that man has received from Allah. Man, by the wisdom of his intellect, took down the birds flying in the air and pulled out the fish from the depths of the river...If man had not been enlightened by his intellect, the Messenger of Allah would not have been accepted.
source_location_hint: Function and utility of intellect in human civilization

excerpt: Allah has given His Messenger a law whose every outward action is linked to his inner knowledge. And He has given a book that has many inner meanings behind every outward verse.
source_location_hint: Doctrine of taʾwīl (esoteric interpretation) and levels of Sharīʿa

excerpt: Knowledge and action: When both unite in a person, he becomes religious, just as soul and body joined make a human being. Action is the image, knowledge is the original. For religion, action is like body and knowledge like soul.
source_location_hint: Explication of knowledge-action unity in religious practice

excerpt: Whoever acts upon his knowledge, it becomes incumbent upon Allah to grant him knowledge of what he knows not, and to aid him in his deeds until Paradise becomes his right. But he who does not act upon his knowledge wanders in darkness until Hell becomes his fate.
source_work: al-Masabih fi Ithbat al-Imama (Lamps in Proof of the Imamate)
source_location_hint: Hadith on consequence of knowledge-action integration

excerpt: These believers attain such living reality that the entire world becomes transparent to them—as if they conversed with all existence. Hence the Messenger of Allah said: Every stone and clod bears witness to My prophethood. To these knowers, the origin and reality of all things stands revealed.
source_location_hint: Gnostic perception and existential transparency of the faithful

excerpt: Seeking knowledge is obligatory upon every believing man and woman...By this, the Holy Prophet made knowledge-seeking a duty. Duty (farīḍa) always surpasses voluntary devotion. Thus the reward for acquiring knowledge exceeds the reward for prayer.
source_location_hint: Superiority of knowledge-seeking over optional worship

excerpt: If you understand not our sciences of realities and subtleties and they seem to contradict common understanding, do not deny them...Whoever reveals Our secrets to the unworthy, Allah shall make him taste the punishment of cold iron.
source_location_hint: Esoteric science and hierarchies of knowledge transmission
